popularStory.headline: History of Cecely Wilford
popularStory.description: CECELY6 WILFORD (THOMAS5, JAMES4, ROBERTS3 WILSFORD, WILLIAM2, JAMES1) was born Aft. 1530 in Kent County, England, and died February 05, 1609/10 in Woodham Ferrers, Essex County, England.  She marri …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Wilford於大約1536年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，她的父親Thomas Wilford49歲，母親Rose Whetenhall30歲。她於1560年2月19日與Archbishop Edwin Sandys在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1611年2月5日在英國艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Wilford于大约1536年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，她的父亲Thomas Wilford49岁，母亲Rose Whetenhall30岁。她于1560年2月19日与Archbishop Edwin Sandys在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1611年2月5日在英国艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯享年76岁，埋葬在英国艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): habitational name from either of two places called Wilford, in Nottinghamshire and Suffolk, both probably named with an Old English wilig ‘willow tree’ + Old English ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Wilfert
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wolf ‘wolf’ + hart ‘hardy, brave’, ‘strong’.
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements willio ‘will, wish’ + fridu ‘peace’.

variants.name: Willford
meanings: English (East Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Rutland, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Wilford  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Wilford was born about 1536, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, her father, Thomas Wilford, was 49 and her mother, Rose Whetenhall, was 30. She married Archbishop Edwin Sandys on 19 February 1560, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 February 1611, in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Wilford est née environ 1536, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wilford, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Rose Whetenhall, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Archbishop Edwin Sandys le 19 février 1560, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1611, à Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Wilford um 1536 in Cranbrook, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wilford 49 und ihre Mutter Rose Whetenhall 30. Sie hat am 19. Februar 1560 in England Archbishop Edwin Sandys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1611 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England und wurde in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Wilford è nata il circa 1536 nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, sua padre, Thomas Wilford, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Rose Whetenhall, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Archbishop Edwin Sandys il 19 febbraio 1560, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1611, nel Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Wilfordが約1536年にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Thomas Wilfordは49歳，母Rose Whetenhallは30歳であった。1560年2月19日にイギリスでArchbishop Edwin Sandysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1611年2月5日にイギリスエセックスウッドハム フエレルズで76歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウッドハム フエレルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Wilford(이)가 대략 1536년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wilford(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose Whetenhall(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1560년 2월 19일 영국에서 Archbishop Edwin Sandys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1611년 2월 5일 영국 에세스 우드함 페레르스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 우드함 페레르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Wilford nasceu aproximadamente 1536, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wilford, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Rose Whetenhall, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Archbishop Edwin Sandys em 19 de fevereiro de 1560, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1611, em Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Wilford родилась около 1536 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wilford было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Rose Whetenhall, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archbishop Edwin Sandys 19 февраля 1560 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 февраля 1611 г. в местности вудхам фиррирс, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности вудхам фиррирс, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Wilford nació aproximadamente 1536, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wilford, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Rose Whetenhall, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Archbishop Edwin Sandys el 19 de febrero de 1560, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1611, en Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra.
